cellestial.util.errors
======================

.. py:module:: cellestial.util.errors


Exceptions
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   cellestial.util.errors.ConflictingKeysError
   cellestial.util.errors.KeyNotFoundError
   cellestial.util.errors.ConfilictingLengthError


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:exception:: ConflictingKeysError(message: str)

   Bases: :py:obj:`Exception`


   Raised when keys conflict.


.. py:exception:: KeyNotFoundError(message: str)

   Bases: :py:obj:`Exception`


   Raised when a key is not found.


.. py:exception:: ConfilictingLengthError(message: str)

   Bases: :py:obj:`Exception`


   Raised when sizes conflict.
